name: 6p21_MHC_HLA_crossref
description: Cross-reference stub for the 6p21.3 MHC region. Full annotation is provided under specific_loci/mhc/. The MHC class I (HLA-A/B/C and pseudogenes E/F/G/H/J/K/L) and class II (HLA-DR/DQ/DP) paralog families are the densest concentration of SD-paralog content on chr6 and one of the most diverse regions in the human genome (>30 Mb of validated alternative haplotypes including PGF/COX/QBL/MANN/APD/SSTO/DBB).

architecture.internal_structure: See organisms/human/specific_loci/mhc/ for detailed sub-region files (class_I, class_II, class_III, alpha/beta/kappa blocks). 8 alt-haplotype contigs in GRCh38 primary assembly.

related_diseases: see /mhc submodule for full disease list
